findings.summary: Readiness is bound to the existing AgentRun PR and exact HEAD, and the merge-capable role starts only after validated open, non-draft confirmation.
The durable pending handoff preserves one deterministic operation ID across restart; the response-loss test demonstrates recovery without a second provider mutation.
Exact HEAD evidence reports 277 tests passed with 2 skipped, while make all passed formatting, specs, Credo, 100% coverage, and Dialyzer.

summary: Passed: the exact-HEAD change satisfies the draft-PR readiness lifecycle, bounded failure handling, bos-mcp-only mutation boundary, and restart/idempotency requirements with affirmative exact-commit validation evidence.
